query:
SELECT 'financial_settings' AS tbl, CAST(withdrawals_enabled AS CHAR) AS enabled, CAST(withdrawal_minimum AS CHAR) AS min_amt, CAST(withdrawal_commission_percent AS CHAR) AS commission
FROM financial_settings
UNION ALL
SELECT 'withdrawal_config', CAST(withdrawals_enabled AS CHAR), CAST(minimum_amount AS CHAR), CAST(commission_percentage AS CHAR)
FROM withdrawal_config
UNION ALL
SELECT 'platform_wallet', CAST(total_commissions AS CHAR), CAST(available_balance AS CHAR), CAST(pending_settlement AS CHAR)
FROM platform_wallet;
